dict.string: WolfSense Mobile needs access to the camera to allow users to capture pictures and videos and add them to thier data log files for documentation purposes.
WolfSense Mobile needs access to the photo gallery to allow users to attach pictures and videos to thier data log files for documentation purposes.
WolfSense Mobile needs access to the microphone to allow users to record audio notes and attach them to thier data log files for documentation purposes.
WolfSense Mobile needs access to the photo gallery to allow users to attach pictures and videos to thier data log files for documentation purposes.
WolfSense Mobile needs access to collected audio files to allow users to record audio notes and attach them to thier data log files for documentation purposes.
WolfSense Mobile needs access to Bluetooth to connect to DirectSense II SmartProbes for Environmental Measurements.
WolfSense Mobile needs access to Bluetooth to connect to DirectSense II SmartProbes for Environmental Measurements.
WolfSense Mobile needs access to Location to store the GPS coordinates of where environmental data was collected in data log files for documentation purposes.
WolfSense Mobile needs access to the Calendar
